block-definition.comment: draw a vector path, a poly-line that visits every item in a list of points, with options to close it (making it a polygon), and to either fill or stroke it

custom-block.s: overlay %adt %adt %br align x: %nUE with %nUE offset %n %br align y: %nUE with %nUE offset %n

block.comment: version that doesn't take the last compoent's pinhole for compound shapes

block-definition.s: overlay %'shape 1' %'shape 2' $nl align x: %'x-place 1' with %'x-place 2' offset %'dx' $nl align y: %'y-place 1' with %'y-place 2' offset %'dy'
